/usr/bin/c++   -Wall -Wextra -pedantic -g  -L/usr/local/lib -rdynamic CMakeFiles/memecad.dir/src/verymeme/common.cpp.o CMakeFiles/memecad.dir/src/verymeme/file.cpp.o CMakeFiles/memecad.dir/src/verymeme/geom.cpp.o CMakeFiles/memecad.dir/src/verymeme/parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/memecad.dir/src/memecad/parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/memecad.dir/src/memecad/types.cpp.o CMakeFiles/memecad.dir/src/memecad/mapper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/memecad.dir/src/memecad/yosys_module.cpp.o CMakeFiles/memecad.dir/src/memecad/util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/memecad.dir/src/memecad/schematic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/memecad.dir/src/programs/memecad.cpp.o  -o memecad -lstdc++ -lm -lrt -lreadline -lffi -ldl -ltcl8.6 -lyosys /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_program_options.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_stacktrace_backtrace.so
